rows.label: tev056401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev056401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Potepote about the caravan.

rows.label: tev056401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev056401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Potepote if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev056401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Potepote about the caravan.

rows.label: tev056401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Potepote about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056401_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Potepote about the food situation in NLA.

rows.label: tev056401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Potepote about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056401_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Potepote about Earth food.

rows.label: tev056401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Potepote about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hold it right there! How dare
friend try to steal turf of
Potepote right from under nose![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Potepote work very hard to find this
spot in Cauldros. Spot very important
supply point for Drongo Caravan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Potepote brave dangerous enemies and cross loads of
lethal lava pits! Friend cannot just waltz in here and
stage coup when Potepote did all the hard... Hmm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Oh, friend is doing battle
with Bias? Wow! Great! Friend
should have said something sooner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Go knock those Bias silly! And
talk to Pissa, aid of Potepote,
if questions come up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Grampypon of Potepote is Nan, elder
who leads all Nopon on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0009
rows.name:
But grampypon acts like big coward
ever since old age set in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Tough-looking xenos come to Mira
and scare pants off grampypon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then grampypon suddenly ditch caravan
and try to convince rest of Nopon to
move to "sanctuary." Crazy talk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Potepote has never been so embarrassed
by relative in whole life. ...Er, but
friend should keep this to self.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Drongo Caravan only made it this far
because of hard work of Potepote![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Pissa? Mo! Pissa is just noisy aide
who likes to tell Nopon what to do![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Potepote is only one with wits and courage
to go on grand adventure, braving vicious
monster attacks and setting up new caravan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0020
rows.name:
For weeks, poor Potepote have
nothing to eat but gerrid jerky.
Ah, those were the days...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Potepote senses that grampypon is
getting close to major meltdown...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0026
rows.name:
For as long as Potepote can remember, grampypon
made big stinks if other Nopon not fall over selves
to make grampypon happy every waking moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Be warned! If grampypon asks friend
to do anything, friend should make
like garbage heap and refuse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1013
rows.name:
Every day grampypon tries to pound
innermost secrets of elderhood into
brain of Potepote. So tiring! Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1014
rows.name:
Still, Potepote happily came to human
city. Any place with this much
scrumptious food is okay by Potepote![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1015
rows.name:
After tasteless fare in Cauldros,
menu in NLA is like never-ending
buffet of yumminess![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1016
rows.name:
Hot dogs! Pizza! Hamburgers! Potepote
ought to sell them all through Nopon
caravans and make killing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1020
rows.name:
Pissa sent Potepote message saying
"Do not come home until Elder Nan
AND Ngogo give Potepote thumbs up."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1021
rows.name:
Can friend believe nerve
of that Nopon? Mo-mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1022
rows.name:
Pissa probably scheming to take over
Drongo Caravan or something...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1023
rows.name:
Well, Pissa can HAVE that teeny-weeny
lousy excuse for caravan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG1024
rows.name:
Once Potepote takes over elder
duties, Potepote will call the shots
and make Pissa sorry! Mwa ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG2025
rows.name:
Grampypon sent message saying to
come to NLA. Is it true that city
of human friend has delicious food?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG2026
rows.name:
Potepote hears good things about "hot dog."
But really? Crushed entrails shoved into bread
and sprayed with blood red sauce? Meh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG2027
rows.name:
Potepote really dodged bullet by
not going anywhere where Nopon
have to eat THAT to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG2032
rows.name:
Pissa sent Potepote message saying "Pissa decide to
start new life in NLA. Do not come looking for Pissa!
...Potepote too stupid to find Pissa anyway."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG2033
rows.name:
Meeeeeeh! The nerve! Potepote definitely
not planning on making effort to find
ungrateful Nopon like Pissa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG2034
rows.name:
Actually, Potepote is starting to get sick of
all this. Work with caravan just gets harder
every day, plus no one listen to Potepote![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056401_MSG2035
rows.name:
Potepote seriously starting
to consider options...[ST:wait ]
